title: feat: add p0 admin support event adjustment controls
goal: Add PATCH /admin/support-events/:eventId for safe local/internal support event adjustment controls.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Stop if package.json, pnpm-lock, contracts, migrations, workflows, scripts, apps/web, apps/overlay, real YouTube API, real OAuth, real RPC, real DB, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, wallet/RPC/deploy changes, or readiness/compliance claims are introduced.
allowedScope: local/internal admin support event adjustment API
doneCriteria: admin support patch requires admin bearer token
admin support patch rejects missing or invalid auth
admin support patch returns 404 for unknown event
admin support patch allows sanitized display name update
admin support patch allows safe moderation status hold to rejected
admin support patch blocks approved to rejected reversal
admin support patch blocks amount_raw and amount_display changes
admin support patch blocks wallet/source/direct affinity changes
admin support patch excludes raw message and raw payload from response
admin support patch writes safe audit log
admin support patch does not duplicate reaction overlay affinity or outbox
securityBoundaries: No DB driver, Redis, or Kafka dependency is added.
No real DB connection is introduced.
No migration is changed or executed.
No real YouTube API or OAuth token is used.
No RPC, wallet, deploy, contracts, workflows, web, or overlay changes.
Raw messages, raw payloads, secrets, URLs, stack output, stdout, stderr, jobs_url, and logs_url are not returned.
No runtime, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness is claimed.
residualRisks: This is local/internal admin support event adjustment only.
Production Admin Console readiness, durable audit retention, real persistence, reversal workflows, and operational policy remain future scoped work.
humanConfirmation: AI review is not human approval.
Merge remains blocked until PR creation, evidence refresh, and same-head checks pass.

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts, runtime dependencies, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, package.json, or pnpm-lock changes are introduced.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Adds local/internal admin support event adjustment controls.

runtimeSmokeRationale: No runtime readiness is claimed; this is local/internal admin support event adjustment only.

reviewScope.scope: P0 admin support event adjustment controls, admin auth, safe field allowlist, forbidden field blocking, safe audit metadata, tests, docs, and .codex evidence.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is mutating money/source/wallet/direct affinity fields, duplicating side effects, or implying readiness; tests and docs reject those outcomes.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Admin support adjustment tests, existing manual support tests, existing moderation hold review tests, full repository tests, evidence checks, quality self-protection, secret scan, and GitHub same-head checks.
